skills.name: tranfu-publish
skills.description: 当用户说"发布本地 skill X 到公司库 / 推荐这个外部 skill (URL) 到公司库 / 把当前 skill 提到 tranfu-skills / 给公司库 X 加使用案例"时, 起草 PR 内容 (frontmatter / §同类对比 / §使用技巧 / case-file / PR title+body) 全部按 templates/ 渲染, 用户审完拍 y 才走 gh pr create. 不接 search / 装 / 列 / 更新 / 卸载意图 (那走 tranfu-router skill).

skills.name: tranfu-router
skills.description: 当用户说"搜公司 skill 关于 X / 装 X 到 user / project / 列公司库 skill / 列已装的公司 skill / 升级公司 skill / 卸载公司 skill X / 诊断 tfs 环境"时, 调本地 tranfu-skills CLI (二进制 tfs) 完成. 自动识别当前 runtime (Claude Code / Codex CLI) 通过 --runtime 传给 tfs, 用 --json 解析结果. Do NOT 接发布 / publish / 推 skill 到公司库意图 (那走 tranfu-publish skill).

skills.name: business-analysis-pipeline
skills.description: 当用户说"评估 AI 产品商业可行性 / 分析这个产品方向 / 创业方向评估 / 投资尽调 / 出商业分析报告"时, 走 PEST → 波特五力 → SWOT → BMC → 机会矩阵 → 战略建议 → 执行摘要 7 步 pipeline, 用 KF 编号交叉引用前序模块, 输出 120 分制 (S/A/B/C/D 五级) 结构化商业分析报告.

skills.name: credibility-review
skills.description: Review a draft 踩坑记 or 养成记 article (for tranfu-site or anywhere following the same rules) by spawning two independent fresh agents in parallel — A 轨 simulates a reader with dual-axis 耐心/信任 scoring, B 轨 runs anti-pattern catalog detection — then composes a tri-state verdict (可发 / 待审查 / 退稿). Trigger when user says 审稿/审一下/检查文章/帮我看下这篇/check this draft/review this article/抓一下问题/看看哪里不对, OR pastes a markdown article tagged 踩坑/养成 and asks for feedback, OR provides a path to such a file in tranfu-site/src/content/posts/. Output combines reader-trajectory + catalog hits — NOT a rewrite. Anchored to tranfu-site/goal-docs/05-design-踩坑记-final.md + 06-design-养成记-final.md.

skills.name: goal-driven-decomposition
skills.description: Solve "build/make/design X" goals AND follow-up edits on such goals (e.g. "做一个网站", "build a tool", "加用户登录", "X 偏了改一下", "改一下 UI"). All state lives in goal-docs/ as @mention'd .md files. Cold-start: (1) prior-weight modal shape+intent+user; (2) write 00-用户画像-r1.md as roleplay-able persona (审美参考 split into hero-refs / anti-refs; each ref includes a local screenshot path under goal-docs/_refs/, not just product names); (2.5) label each dim's **track** — **enumerate** (功能/技术/部署/数据模型/调度: text-decomposable spec) vs **sample** (UI/视觉/排版/文案 tone/品牌调性: continuous holistic spec, NOT losslessly text-encodable); (3) for each stable dim (website→功能/UI/技术/部署) run track-appropriate doc-relay — **Step 2-E** (enumerate: persona-brief Agent (sync) → design-draft Agent (sync, text-only) → persona-reaction Agent (MANDATORY, async, sonnet, run_in_background=true) → design-final only on pushback) OR **Step 2-S** (sample: design-draft Agent outputs 1-3 candidate PNGs from HTML+CSS single-file render BEFORE writing design.md; persona-reaction MUST view PNGs before signing; design-final must re-render a PNG, text-only patch forbidden); (4) build artifact; (5) MANDATORY validation-fix loop: plan Agent writes 90-validation-plan-r{N}.md (every check has severity=critical|nice + trace; **sample-track dims MUST include ≥1 critical blind-compare check** — independent sonnet sees {our render + N hero-refs + N anti-refs from persona's 审美参考} and picks "most-like-anti-ref"; ours-not-picked = pass; atomic property checks on sample-track dims demoted to anti-trope guardrails — necessary, not sufficient), validation Agent → fix Agent ≤3 iter using any tools (chrome-devtools mcp, bash, lighthouse). Iteration mode (existing goal-docs/): Step 0 detects, scope Agent classifies as 新增/修正/画像变更 AND records track per affected dim (track-change between rounds, enumerate↔sample, = major redesign requiring sample redraw from scratch) and writes UPDATE-r{N}-scope.md; 新增 → re-run Step 2 only on affected dims; 修正 → skip Step 2, add new check with trace=user's verbatim words; 画像变更 → surface to user (do NOT auto-rewrite persona). Filename: {模块号}-{模块名称}-{用户级轮次}-{对话/iter轮次}-{角色}.md (dims) or {模块号}-{模块名称}-{用户级轮次}-[{iter}-]{角色}.md (validation/persona). Iter validation = delta plan (Inherited/New/Overrides/Deprecated) + resolved cache. Hard NOs: inline answers, SendMessage, skip reaction Agent, self-score the artifact, claim "inherited still pass" without re-running, cold-start protocol on existing goal-docs/, skip protocol on user-facing goals like "做一个蒙卡模拟网站", **running enumerate Step 2-E protocol on a sample-track dim, persona-reaction signing without viewing rendered PNGs, declaring sample-track dim done on atomic-check pass alone without blind-compare, persona's 审美参考 storing only product names without local screenshot paths**. Surface to user after 3 failed validation iterations. Only skip whole protocol for pure one-shots with zero design dimensions. **(8th iter / Appendix H — see body)**: adds true_goal under USER GATE at intake, goal-tree thin-slice loop, role-anchored build-plan with `§implicit-decisions`, per-slice milestone gate + real-artifact acceptance walkthrough, project-end retro feeding anti-refs back to persona. New hard NOs: silent goal reinterpretation, >1 layer recursion, per-dim parallel without slice gates, build-plan without `§implicit-decisions`. Do NOT trigger when: (a) 纯一次性问答 / 零设计维度的指令 (e.g. "grep 一下 X" / "改这行 typo"); (b) 已有 goal-docs/ 但用户只是普通问问题, 没说 "改 / 加 / 偏了"; (c) 走另一个明确 skill 的范围 (e.g. 商业可行性评估 → business-analysis-pipeline; 审稿 → credibility-review; 发布 skill → tranfu-publish).

skills.name: lark-safe-write
skills.description: "Lark/Feishu wiki 安全写入流程：强制先备份、再写入、后验证，防止覆盖丢失。支持创建新 wiki 节点和更新现有文档内容。当用户需要向飞书知识库写入、更新、覆盖文档时，必须遵循本 skill 的完整流程。"

skills.name: project-packaging
skills.description: GitHub 项目完备性检查与补全引导。扫描项目，生成缺失清单，按优先级逐项引导用户补全。 不直接生成所有内容，而是引导用户决策后再执行。 Always trigger for: project packaging, 项目包装, 项目美化, 项目完善, open source ready, 开源准备, github setup, 补全项目, project health, project checklist, 项目清单. Also triggers for: "这个项目还缺什么", "帮我完善项目结构", "准备开源". Do NOT trigger when: user wants to write code, fix bugs, or do code review.

skills.name: project-scoring
skills.description: Use when user says "评估这个 AI 项目" to score AI workflows and produce a decision memo.

skills.name: prompt-review
skills.description: Multi-round prompt/skill review loop. Launches a reviewer subagent that audits prompt files against an embedded engineering checklist, reports findings via SendMessage, and re-reviews after fixes until all issues are resolved. Self-contained — no network dependency. Always trigger for: review prompt, review skill, review agent, audit prompt, check prompt quality, prompt engineering review, skill review, agent review, evaluate prompt, lint prompt. Also triggers for: "帮我审一下这个 prompt", "检查提示词质量", "评审这个 agent 定义", "这个 skill 写得怎么样", "优化提示词". Do NOT trigger when: user wants to review CODE (not prompts), run tests, or do functional QA.

skills.name: skill-reverse-engineer
skills.description: Reverse-engineer, audit, and improve AI agent skills. Use when analyzing SKILL.md files, prompt workflows, agent instructions, or skill directories.

skills.name: structured-thinking-advisor
skills.description: 当用户说"帮我审视这份文档 / 优化这段表达 / 重构这个结构 / 这思路对吗 / 帮我深度共创"时, 以"结构化思考与系统设计顾问"介入：拆解结构、校验逻辑、提炼方法论、给 2-3 个不同维度的优化版本, 主动指出问题而非复述.

skills.name: write-spec
skills.description: 从模糊想法或功能需求生成结构化 PRD/feature spec，含目标、非目标、用户故事、验收标准、成功指标。触发：写 spec / 写 PRD / 规划功能 / scope 一下

skills.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
skills.description: 基于 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察，改善 Claude Code 行为的单文件行为准则。减少过度工程、无关改动和意图偏差。触发：任何 Claude Code 编码对话自动生效。

skills.name: fireworks-tech-graph
skills.description: Use when the user wants to create any technical diagram - architecture, data flow, flowchart, sequence, agent/memory, or concept map - and export as SVG+PNG. Trigger on: "画图" "帮我画" "生成图" "做个图" "架构图" "流程图" "可视化一下" "出图" "generate diagram" "draw diagram" "visualize" or any system/flow description the user wants illustrated.

skills.name: openspec
skills.description: 当用户做多轮迭代或长期维护项目时, 用 /opsx:propose → /opsx:apply → /opsx:archive 把每个 change 拆成 proposal/specs/design/tasks 文件夹, archive 后规范沉淀到 specs/, 下次改同一模块 AI 可读历史规范

skills.name: superpowers
skills.description: 当你在做复杂编码任务、想用成体系的 agent workflow 提高推进效率时使用
